Title: Craft Commerce: Partial Payment Amount Without Lower Bound Validation
Description: The `Order::setPaymentAmount()` method accepts any float value without enforcing a minimum positive amount. The PaymentsController casts the user-supplied 'paymentAmount' parameter directly to float with no lower-bound check.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 4.0.0 before 4.11.2, all versions starting from 5.0.0 before 5.6.5
NotImpacted: All versions before 4.0.0, all versions starting from 4.11.2 before 5.0.0, all versions starting from 5.6.5
